caption: A video call is captured in a split-screen format featuring two people. On the left, a woman with red hair wearing a blue patterned shirt and red earrings is seen in a close-up shot. On the right, a man with glasses, a beard, and a light blue shirt is positioned in a room with a framed picture and an "OPEN" sign visible in the background. Blue banners overlay the bottom of the screen; the left banner reads "FOCUS with Margaret Harrington" and the right banner reads "No More Time Climate Crisis Poems by Greg Delanty," accompanied by a "TOWN MEETING TV" logo. Throughout the sequence, both individuals are speaking, with their facial expressions and mouth movements shifting. The man's gaze moves slightly as he talks, and the woman continues to listen and react, while the overall setting and on-screen graphics remain constant.
